# hsi

`hsi` is an R package to manipulate Habitat Suitability (HSI) data
frames. A HSI data frame is a data frame with a Habitat (integer) and
Index (double) column where the Habitat values are an increasing
continous sequence and the index values are between 0 and 1.

## Installation

To install the latest development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/hsi)

``` R
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("poissonconsulting/hsi")
```

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the hsi project is released with a [Contributor Code of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/0/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`check_hsi()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/check_hsi.md)
  : Check HSI Data
- [`check_transect()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/check_transect.md)
  : Check Transect
- [`hsi_by()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_by.md)
  : HSI By
- [`hsi_data`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_data.md)
  : HSI Data
- [`hsi_plot()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_plot.md)
  : Plot HSI Data
- [`hsi_pref()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_pref.md)
  : HSI Use
- [`hsi_sample_to_index()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_sample_to_index.md)
  : Sample to Index
- [`hsi_seq_by()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_seq_by.md)
  : HSI Sequence
- [`hsi_set_by()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_set_by.md)
  : HSI Set By
- [`hsi_transect_set_by()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_transect_set_by.md)
  : Transect Set By
- [`hsi_transect_to_index()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_transect_to_index.md)
  : Transect to HSI Index
- [`hsi_transect_to_sample()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_transect_to_sample.md)
  : Transect to Sample
- [`hsi_use()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/hsi_use.md)
  : HSI Use
- [`trans_data`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/hsi/reference/trans_data.md)
  : Transect Data
